220→    /**
221→     * Updates the data for the adapter while retaining visible item in certain cases.
222→     *
223→     * PagedList tries to keep the visible item by adding new items outside of the screen while modifying the scroll
224→     * position. In most cases, this works out great because it doesn't interrupt to the user. However, after a new
225→     * item is inserted at the top while the list is showing the very first items, it feels very weird to not have the
226→     * inserted item shown. For example, if a new draft is added there is no indication of it except for the flash
227→     * of the scroll bar which is not noticeable unless user is paying attention to it.
228→     *
229→     * In these cases, we try to keep the scroll position the same instead of keeping the visible item the same by
230→     * first saving the state and re-applying it after the data updates are completed. Since `PagedListAdapter` uses
231→     * bg thread to calculate the changes, we need to post the change in the bg thread as well so that it'll be applied
232→     * after changes are reflected.
233→     */
234→    private fun updatePagedListData(pagedListData: PagedPostList) {
235→        val recyclerViewState = recyclerView?.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
236→        postListAdapter.submitList(pagedListData)
237→        recyclerView?.post {
238→            (recyclerView?.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
239→                if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() < MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION) {
240→                    layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
241→                }
242→            }
243→        }
244→    }
245→
246→    private fun updateEmptyViewForState(state: PostListEmptyUiState) {
247→        actionableEmptyView?.let { emptyView ->
248→            if (state.emptyViewVisible) {
249→                emptyView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
250→                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(emptyView.title, state.title)
251→                uiHelpers.setImageOrHide(emptyView.image, state.imgResId)
252→                setupButtonOrHide(emptyView.button, state.buttonText, state.onButtonClick)
253→            } else {
254→                emptyView.visibility = View.GONE
255→            }
256→        }
257→    }
258→
259→    private fun setupButtonOrHide(
260→        buttonView: Button,
261→        text: UiString?,
262→        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)?
263→    ) {
264→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(buttonView, text)
265→        buttonView.setOnClickListener { onButtonClick?.invoke() }
266→    }
267→
268→    fun scrollToTargetPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
269→        viewModel.scrollToPost(localPostId)
270→    }
271→
272→    companion object {
273→        const val TAG = "post_list_fragment_tag"
274→
275→        @JvmStatic
276→        fun newInstance(
277→            site: SiteModel,
278→            postListType: PostListType
279→        ): PostListFragment {
280→            val fragment = PostListFragment()
281→            val bundle = Bundle()
282→            bundle.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
283→            bundle.putSerializable(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
284→            fragment.arguments = bundle
285→            return fragment
286→        }
287→    }
288→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.content.Context
  4→import android.graphics.Color
  5→import android.graphics.drawable.ColorDrawable
  6→import android.graphics.drawable.Drawable
  7→import android.text.SpannableStringBuilder
  8→import android.text.style.ImageSpan
  9→import android.view.LayoutInflater
 10→import android.view.Menu
 11→import android.view.View
 12→import android.view.ViewGroup
 13→import android.widget.FrameLayout
 14→import android.widget.ImageButton
 15→import android.widget.ImageView
 16→import android.widget.ImageView.ScaleType
 17→import android.widget.PopupMenu
 18→import android.widget.ProgressBar
 19→import android.widget.TextView
 20→import androidx.annotation.ColorRes
 21→import androidx.annotation.LayoutRes
 22→import androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
 23→import androidx.core.content.ContextCompat
 24→import androidx.core.graphics.drawable.DrawableCompat
 25→import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
 26→import org.wordpress.android.R
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiHelpers
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 29→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.expandTouchTargetArea
 30→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getColorFromAttribute
 31→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getDrawableFromAttribute
 32→import org.wordpress.android.util.image.ImageManager
 33→import org.wordpress.android.util.image.ImageType
 34→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemAction
 35→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemAction.MoreItem
 36→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemAction.SingleItem
 37→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemType.PostListItemUiState
 38→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemUiStateData
 39→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.uistate.ProgressBarUiState
 40→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.PostListButton
 41→import org.wordpress.android.widgets.WPTextView
 42→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
 43→import android.R as AndroidR
 44→
 45→const val POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING = 8
 46→
 47→sealed class PostListItemViewHolder(
 48→    @LayoutRes layout: Int,
 49→    parent: ViewGroup,
 50→    private val imageManager: ImageManager,
 51→    private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 52→) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 53→    private val featuredImageView: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.image_featured)
 54→    private val titleTextView: WPTextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.title)
 55→    private val postInfoTextView: WPTextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.post_info)
 56→    private val statusesTextView: WPTextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.statuses_label)
 57→    private val uploadProgressBar: ProgressBar = itemView.findViewById(R.id.upload_progress)
 58→    private val disabledOverlay: FrameLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.disabled_overlay)
 59→    private val container: ConstraintLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.container)
 60→    private val selectableBackground: Drawable? = parent.context.getDrawableFromAttribute(
 61→        AndroidR.attr.selectableItemBackground
 62→    )
 63→
 64→    /**
 65→     * Url of an image loaded in the `featuredImageView`.
 66→     */
 67→    private var loadedFeaturedImgUrl: String? = null
 68→
 69→    companion object {
 70→        var isClickEnabled = AtomicBoolean(true)
 71→    }
 72→
 73→    abstract fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState)
 74→
 75→    class Standard(
 76→        parent: ViewGroup,
 77→        imageManager: ImageManager,
 78→        private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 79→    ) : PostListItemViewHolder(R.layout.post_list_item, parent, imageManager, uiHelpers) {
 80→        private val excerptTextView: WPTextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.excerpt)
 81→        private val actionButtons: List<PostListButton> = listOf(
 82→            itemView.findViewById(R.id.btn_primary),
 83→            itemView.findViewById(R.id.btn_secondary),
 84→            itemView.findViewById(R.id.btn_ternary)
 85→        )
 86→
 87→        override fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState) {
 88→            setBasicValues(item.data)
 89→
 90→            uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(excerptTextView, item.data.excerpt)
 91→            itemView.setOnClickListener {
 92→                if (isSafeClick(it)) {
 93→                    item.onSelected.invoke()
 94→                }
 95→            }
 96→
 97→            actionButtons.forEachIndexed { index, button ->
 98→                updateMenuItem(button, item.actions.getOrNull(index))
 99→            }
100→        }
101→
102→        private fun updateMenuItem(postListButton: PostListButton, action: PostListItemAction?) {
103→            uiHelpers.updateVisibility(postListButton, action != null)
104→            if (action != null) {
105→                when (action) {
106→                    is SingleItem -> {
107→                        postListButton.updateButtonType(action.buttonType)
108→                        postListButton.setOnClickListener {
109→                            if (isSafeClick(it)) {
110→                                action.onButtonClicked.invoke(action.buttonType)
111→                            }
112→                        }
113→                    }
114→                    is MoreItem -> {
115→                        postListButton.updateButtonType(action.buttonType)
116→                        postListButton.setOnClickListener { view ->
117→                            action.onButtonClicked.invoke(action.buttonType)
118→                            onMoreClicked(action.actions, view)
119→                        }
120→                    }
121→                }
122→            }
123→        }
124→
125→        // Purpose of this method is to prevent 2 Editors
126→        // from being launched simultaneously and then producing a crash
127→        private fun isSafeClick(view: View): Boolean {
128→            if (isClickEnabled.getAndSet(false)) {
129→                view.postDelayed({
130→                    isClickEnabled.set(true)
131→                }, 1000)
132→                return true
133→            }
134→            return false
135→        }
136→    }
137→
138→    class Compact(
139→        parent: ViewGroup,
140→        imageManager: ImageManager,
141→        private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
142→    ) : PostListItemViewHolder(R.layout.post_list_item_compact, parent, imageManager, uiHelpers) {
143→        private val moreButton: ImageButton = itemView.findViewById(R.id.more_button)
144→
145→        override fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState) {
146→            setBasicValues(item.data)
147→
148→            itemView.setOnClickListener { item.onSelected.invoke() }
149→            uiHelpers.updateVisibility(moreButton, item.compactActions.actions.isNotEmpty())
150→            moreButton.expandTouchTargetArea(R.dimen.post_list_more_button_extra_padding)
151→            moreButton.setOnClickListener { onMoreClicked(item.compactActions.actions, moreButton) }
152→        }
153→    }
154→
155→    protected fun setBasicValues(data: PostListItemUiStateData) {
156→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(titleTextView, data.title)
157→        updatePostInfoLabel(postInfoTextView, data.postInfo)
158→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(statusesTextView, data.statuses.isNotEmpty())
159→        updateStatusesLabel(statusesTextView, data.statuses, data.statusesDelimiter, data.statusesColor)
160→        showFeaturedImage(data.imageUrl)
161→        updateProgressBarState(data.progressBarUiState)
162→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(disabledOverlay, data.showOverlay)
163→        if (data.disableRippleEffect) {
164→            container.background = null
165→        } else {
166→            container.background = selectableBackground
167→        }
168→    }
169→
170→    private fun updatePostInfoLabel(view: TextView, uiStrings: List<UiString>?) {
171→        val concatenatedText = uiStrings?.joinToString(separator = "  ·  ") {
172→            uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it)
173→        }
174→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(view, concatenatedText)
175→    }
176→
177→    protected fun onMoreClicked(actions: List<PostListItemAction>, v: View) {
178→        val menu = PopupMenu(v.context, v)
179→        actions.forEach { singleItemAction ->
180→            val menuItem = menu.menu.add(
181→                Menu.NONE,
182→                singleItemAction.buttonType.value,
183→                Menu.NONE,
184→                getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(v.context, singleItemAction)
185→            )
186→            menuItem.setOnMenuItemClickListener {
187→                singleItemAction.onButtonClicked.invoke(singleItemAction.buttonType)
188→                true
189→            }
190→        }
191→        menu.show()
192→    }
193→
194→    private fun updateProgressBarState(progressBarUiState: ProgressBarUiState) {
195→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(uploadProgressBar, progressBarUiState.visibility)
196→        when (progressBarUiState) {
197→            is ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate -> uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = true
198→            is ProgressBarUiState.Determinate -> {
199→                uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = false
200→                uploadProgressBar.progress = progressBarUiState.progress
201→            }
202→            is ProgressBarUiState.Hidden -> Unit // Do nothing
203→        }
204→    }
205→
206→    private fun updateStatusesLabel(
207→        view: WPTextView,
208→        statuses: List<UiString>,
209→        delimiter: UiString,
210→        @ColorRes color: Int?
211→    ) {
212→        val separator = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, delimiter)
213→        view.text = statuses.joinToString(separator) { uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it) }
214→        color?.let { statusColor ->
215→            view.setTextColor(
216→                ContextCompat.getColor(
217→                    itemView.context,
218→                    statusColor
219→                )
220→            )
221→        }
222→    }
223→
224→    private fun showFeaturedImage(imageUrl: String?) {
225→        if (!imageUrl.isNullOrBlank() && imageUrl == loadedFeaturedImgUrl) {
226→            // Suppress blinking as the media upload progresses
227→            return
228→        }
229→        if (imageUrl.isNullOrBlank()) {
230→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.GONE
231→            imageManager.cancelRequestAndClearImageView(featuredImageView)
232→        } else {
233→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
234→            imageManager.load(featuredImageView, ImageType.PHOTO, imageUrl, ScaleType.CENTER_CROP)
235→        }
236→        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
237→    }
238→
239→    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
240→        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
241→        if (color != 0) {
242→            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
243→            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
244→        }
245→        return wrappedDrawable
246→    }
247→
248→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
249→    private fun getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(context: Context, item: PostListItemAction): SpannableStringBuilder {
250→        var icon: Drawable? = setTint(
251→            context,
252→            context.getDrawable(item.buttonType.iconResId)!!, item.buttonType.colorAttrId
253→        )
254→        // If there's no icon, we insert a transparent one to keep the title aligned with the items which have icons.
255→        if (icon == null) icon = ColorDrawable(Color.TRANSPARENT)
256→        val iconSize: Int = context.getResources().getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.menu_item_icon_size)
257→        icon.setBounds(0, 0, iconSize, iconSize)
258→        val imageSpan = ImageSpan(icon)
259→
260→        // Add a space placeholder for the icon, before the title.
261→        val menuTitle = context.getText(item.buttonType.textResId)
262→        val ssb = SpannableStringBuilder(
263→            menuTitle.padStart(menuTitle.length + POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING)
264→        )
265→
266→        // Replace the space placeholder with the icon.
267→        ssb.setSpan(imageSpan, 1, 2, 0)
268→        return ssb
269→    }
270→}
271→

 47→
 48→    @Before
 49→    fun setUp() {
 50→        val prefs = mock<AppPrefsWrapper>()
 51→
 52→        whenever(editPostRepository.postChanged).thenReturn(MutableLiveData(Event(PostModel())))
 53→
 54→        viewModel = PostListMainViewModel(
 55→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
 56→            postStore = mock(),
 57→            accountStore = mock(),
 58→            uploadStore = mock(),
 59→            mediaStore = mock(),
 60→            networkUtilsWrapper = mock(),
 61→            prefs = prefs,
 62→            previewStateHelper = mock(),
 63→            analyticsTracker = mock(),

 65→            bgDispatcher = testDispatcher(),
 66→            postListEventListenerFactory = mock(),
 67→            uploadStarter = uploadStarter,
 68→            uploadActionUseCase = mock(),
 69→            savePostToDbUseCase = savePostToDbUseCase
 70→        )
 71→    }
 72→
 73→    @Test
 74→    fun `when started, it uploads all local drafts`() {
 75→        viewModel.start(site, PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, currentBottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
 76→
 77→        verify(uploadStarter, times(1)).queueUploadFromSite(eq(site))
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    @Test
 81→    fun `calling onSearch() updates search query`() {
 82→        val testSearch = "keyword"
 83→        viewModel.start(site, PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, currentBottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
 84→
 85→        var searchQuery: String? = null
 86→        viewModel.searchQuery.observeForever {
 87→            searchQuery = it
 88→        }
 89→
 90→        viewModel.onSearch(testSearch)
 91→
 92→        assertThat(searchQuery).isEqualTo(testSearch)
 93→    }

 95→    @Test
 96→    fun `expanding and collapsing search triggers isSearchExpanded`() {
 97→        viewModel.start(site, PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, currentBottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
 98→
 99→        var isSearchExpanded = false
100→        viewModel.isSearchExpanded.observeForever {
101→            isSearchExpanded = it
102→        }
103→
104→        viewModel.onSearchExpanded(false)
105→        assertThat(isSearchExpanded).isTrue()
106→
107→        viewModel.onSearchCollapsed(delay = 0)
108→        assertThat(isSearchExpanded).isFalse()
109→    }

111→    @Test
112→    fun `expanding search after configuration change preserves search query`() {
113→        val testSearch = "keyword"
114→
115→        viewModel.start(site, PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, currentBottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
116→
117→        var searchQuery: String? = null
118→        viewModel.searchQuery.observeForever {
119→            searchQuery = it
120→        }
121→
122→        viewModel.onSearch(testSearch)
123→
124→        assertThat(searchQuery).isNotNull()
125→        assertThat(searchQuery).isEqualTo(testSearch)
126→
127→        viewModel.onSearchExpanded(true)
128→        assertThat(searchQuery).isEqualTo(testSearch)
129→
130→        viewModel.onSearchCollapsed(0)
131→
132→        viewModel.onSearchExpanded(false)
133→        assertThat(searchQuery).isNull()
134→    }

137→    fun `if currentBottomSheetPostId isn't 0 then set the post in editPostRepository from the postStore`() {
138→        // arrange
139→        val bottomSheetPostId = LocalId(2)
140→
141→        // act
142→        viewModel.start(site, PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, bottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
143→
144→        // assert
145→        verify(editPostRepository, times(1)).loadPostByLocalPostId(any())
146→    }

149→    fun `if currentBottomSheetPostId is 0 then don't set the post in editPostRepository from the postStore`() {
150→        // arrange

153→        // act

471→    /**
472→     * Only the non-null variables will be changed in the current state
473→     */
474→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
475→    private fun updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(
476→        isFabVisible: Boolean? = null,
477→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean? = null,
478→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection? = null,
479→        authorFilterItems: List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState>? = null
480→    ) {
481→        val currentState = requireNotNull(viewState.value) {
482→            "updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange should not be called before the initial state is set"
483→        }
484→
485→        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
486→            isFabVisible ?: currentState.isFabVisible,
487→            isAuthorFilterVisible ?: currentState.isAuthorFilterVisible,
488→            authorFilterSelection ?: currentState.authorFilterSelection,
489→            authorFilterItems ?: currentState.authorFilterItems
490→        )
491→
492→        if (authorFilterSelection != null && currentState.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
493→            _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
494→
495→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
496→                POST_LIST_AUTHOR_FILTER_CHANGED,
497→                site,
498→                mutableMapOf(TRACKS_SELECTED_AUTHOR_FILTER to authorFilterSelection.toString() as Any)
499→            )
500→        }
501→    }

531→    private fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {
532→        // We need only transitions, so...
533→        if (_previewState.value == newState) return
534→
535→        AppLog.d(
536→            AppLog.T.POSTS,
537→            "Posts list preview state machine: transition from ${_previewState.value} to $newState"
538→        )
539→
540→        // update the state
541→        val prevState = _previewState.value
542→        _previewState.postValue(newState)
543→
544→        // take care of exit actions on state transition
545→        previewStateHelper.managePreviewStateTransitions(
546→            newState,
547→            prevState,
548→            postInfo,
549→            postActionHandler::handleRemotePreview
550→        )
551→    }
